requirements.object: Contents

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions,
2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Payments Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
requirements.object: the date of issue

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Payments Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in these Directions does
not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the extant statutory and
regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an
activity, transaction, or item.
requirements.object: statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity, transaction, or item

requirements.full_sentence:
'Corporate bonds and debentures' mean debt securities which create or
acknowledge indebtedness, including (a) debentures, (b) bonds, (c)
commercial papers, (d) certificate of deposits, and such other securities of
a company, a multilateral financial institution or a body corporate
constituted by or under a Central Act or a State Act, whether constituting a
charge on the assets of the company or body corporate or not, and includes
convertible instruments and instruments of a perpetual nature, but does not
include (a) debt securities issued by Central Government or a State
Government, or such other persons as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank, (b) security receipts, and (c) securitisation notes.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank, (b) security receipts, and (c) securitisation notes

requirements.full_sentence:

as specified in paragraph 16.

preference shares, convertible instruments, and equity-like products, as
specified in paragraph 23.

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall undertake investment activities as per the terms and conditions
specified in these Directions.
requirements.object: per the terms and conditions specified in these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall adopt a comprehensive Investment Policy duly approved by the
Board.
requirements.object: Policy duly approved by the Board

The Investment Policy shall, at the minimum, include:
(1).

requirements.full_sentence: Derivatives in which the bank shall deal;

The Investment Policy shall be framed to ensure that the market risk
management for the bank shall be in accordance with the provisions applicable
to commercial banks.
requirements.object: that the market risk management for the bank shall be in accordance with the provisions applicable to commercial banks

requirements.full_sentence:
The Investment Policy shall be framed to ensure that transactions in securities
and derivatives are conducted in accordance with sound and acceptable
business practices.
requirements.object: that transactions in securities and derivatives are conducted in accordance with sound and acceptable business practices

requirements.full_sentence:

including those on private placement basis, sub-limits for Public Sector

There shall be proper risk management systems for making investment in
corporate bonds which shall include entry-level minimum credit ratings / quality
standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise, issuer-wise, etc.,
limits to mitigate the adverse impact of concentration and liquidity risk.
requirements.object: systems for making investment in corporate bonds which shall include entry-level minimum credit ratings / quality standards

requirements.full_sentence:

equities and the policy for managing associated risks.

1A bank shall create an Investment Fluctuation Reserve (IFR) out of the realised

portfolio.
